title: Cursor pagination over joined + aggregated feed
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.cursor_page_with_counts/1` that returns a cursor-paginated feed of posts along with each post's comment count, using keyset cursor on `(inserted_at desc, id desc)`. The query must: (a) left_join comments, (b) group by post, (c) compute `comment_count`, (d) apply the keyset comparison, (e) limit. Cursor is `{ts, id}` or `nil`. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Cursor + aggregate + join is a demanding combination. Most challenging mid-range pagination scenario.
